input_contract: Consumes approved outputs from `APB_BRIDGE-L3_ARCHITECTURE-001` (`layer_L3_architecture/specs/03_architecture_spec.md`), plus verification intent `APB_BRIDGE-L3_ARCHITECTURE-TP-001` (`layer_L3_architecture/specs/03_architecture_test_plan.md`) and latest evidence `APB_BRIDGE-L3_ARCHITECTURE-TR-001` (`layer_L3_architecture/specs/03_architecture_test_report.md`).
